name: xml-python-lsp
description: A language server example using language services to support embedded languages
author: Microsoft Corporation

xmlPython.sourceFile.description: Path to a Python file to act as the global completion context for <exec> tags in XML.

xmlPython.ignoreDiagnostics.description: List of diagnostic error codes or messages to ignore (e.g. 'reportUndefinedVariable' or 'reportGeneralTypeIssues').

scripts.vscode:prepublish: cd client && npm install && cd .. && npm run compile
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ..
